name: Product In Use
description: Реальный человек естественно использует товар. Фокус на взаимодействии. Натуральная лайфстайл фотография.
prompt_prefix: Premium lifestyle photography. A real person naturally using the product. Focus on the authentic interaction between hands and product. Relaxed facial expression, not exaggerated. Natural movement moment. Magazine editorial style. Ultra realistic. 8K. Commercial quality. Shallow depth of field on background.
composition: Person using product naturally, product visually prominent, shallow DOF
lighting: Natural window light, soft shadows, warm neutral tone
